text.font-family: Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace
Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace

svg.text: Q: What is self-attention in transformers?

text.font-family: Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace
Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace

svg.text: Self-attention is a mechanism that allows each token in a sequence to attend

text.font-family: Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace

svg.text: to every other token, computing relevance scores between all position pairs.

text.font-family: Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace

svg.text: It uses three learned projections - Query, Key, and Value - to determine how

text.font-family: Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace

svg.text: much focus each element should place on others in the sequence. This enables

text.font-family: Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace

svg.text: the model to capture long-range dependencies without recurrence, making it

text.font-family: Cascadia Code, Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, monospace

svg.text: highly parallelizable and effective for both NLP and vision tasks.
